name: [Deprecated] Corynebacterium species
description: Deprecated — genus-level set too broad; overlaps the species sets. Use the species-specific Corynebacterium sets (e.g. Corynebacterium amycolatum, Corynebacterium striatum) instead.

en.name: [Deprecated] Corynebacterium species
en.shortDescription: Deprecated — genus-level set too broad; overlaps the species sets. Use the species-specific Corynebacterium sets (e.g. Corynebacterium amycolatum, Corynebacterium striatum) instead.

fr.name: [Obsolète] Corynebacterium species
fr.shortDescription: Obsolète — set au niveau genre trop large, chevauche les sets espèces. Utiliser les sets Corynebacterium par espèce (ex. Corynebacterium amycolatum, Corynebacterium striatum).

versions.message: Deprecated: genus-level Corynebacterium set is too broad and overlaps the per-species Corynebacterium sets.
